markdownRemark.html:
Technologies/dependencies:

C++ (mostly C++98), OpenGL, Bullet physics, SDL, stdlib, make.

Description:

The bulk of the engine was written during my mid-career “gap year” in 2012. It uses the least amount of dependencies I was comfortable with (read: hardly any). Engine development was done in parallel to the “Run” demo (2.5D side scrolling shooter).

Features:

  • Cross-platform targets (OS X, Linux, Windows/mingw)
  • Renderer separated from engine logic to allow for multiple renderers (OpenGL/OpenGL ES, and others). Implemented using visitor/scene graph.
  • Landscape defined as mathematic functions
  • Animation support: tween animation (with support for functions to define transformation), flip book animation
  • Primitive camera follow.
  • Animated menu/titles

frontmatter.title: Cross platform 2.5D side scrolling game engine
